sentences.text: Thank you for calling trilogy real estate management. If you know your party's extension you may enter it at any time during this recording for last and leasing information dial twenty, one for Nicole to reach your property managers dial sixteen for Eric zero dollars twenty four for Ashley to reach an assistant property manager dial nineteen for Allison to reach Mr. Greenberg dial, seventeen, Andrew, Greenburg dial twenty, Maria dial twenty, five for accounts payable dial thirteen for Beatrice. Accounts receivable dial fourteen from Atlanta to leave a general message dial twelve our office hours are from eight thirty AM to five PM Monday through Thursday from eight thirty, AM to four PM on Fridays, we're close between twelve noon and one PM please note that our office ours may change due to the current COVID-19 pandemic. Our fax number is six one nine two three one one two two eight and our website address is trilogy management dot. Com. If this is an emergency hang up and dial six one nine seven four four nine seven five three to reach our answering service and the appropriate person will be contacted. Thank you. And have a great day. Please hold a moment. Extension one two.
